title: 1K ARR and Too Scared to Launch

number: 8

summary: Colleen is overwhelmed in a good way after saying yes to everything, and

  on Ruby Native but can't bring himself to launch it.
---

<p>Colleen is overwhelmed in a good way after saying yes to everything, and Joe pushes her to stop planning and just run ads for two weeks. Joe hits 1K ARR on Ruby Native but can't bring himself to launch it. Colleen pushes back on scope creep and they land on a two-phase launch plan. Plus, the irony of AI making both of them work more, not less.</p><p></p><p>Chapters</p><ul><li>00:00 Life Updates and Overwhelm</li><li>07:00 Exploring New Markets</li><li>12:59 Balancing Work and Productivity</li><li>21:57 Client Work and Side Projects</li><li>29:48 Expanding Scope and Product Features</li><li>36:21 Market Validation and Launch Strategy</li><li>42:17 Planning the Product Launch</li><li>47:25 Final Preparations and Launch Strategy</li></ul>
